# Agentic Desk

> Desktop-native AI second brain — real-time voice assistant, knowledge graph, skill/prompt catalogs.
> https://github.com/arcipelago-international/agentic-desk

## Core stack
- Desktop: Wails v2 (Go → native macOS .app)
- Frontend: Vue.js 3 (Composition API), Vite, Pinia
- Backend: Go 1.22+, Gin, Gorilla WebSocket
- AI: Google Gemini Live API + Genkit SDK (google.golang.org/genai v1.57.0)
- Database: PostgreSQL (local, trust-auth)
- Audio capture: AudioWorklet (raw PCM16 @16kHz, 512-sample chunks)
- Audio playback: Web Audio API (gapless, adaptive cursor)

## Key files
- AGENTS.md — entry point for developers/agents
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — full architecture with Mermaid diagrams
- docs/adr/ — Architecture Decision Records
- docs/superpowers/specs/ — design documents
- internal/voicelive/voicelive.go — Gemini Live API relay
- cmd/desktop/frontend/src/lib/voiceLive.js — mic capture + playback SDK
- cmd/desktop/frontend/public/pcm-capture-worklet.js — AudioWorklet processor

## Build
- `make desktop-frontend` — Vue.js SPA build
- `make desktop-build` — Wails desktop .app
- `make desktop-run` — run app (single instance)
- `make web` — browser dev server
- `make test` — Go unit tests

## Voice pipeline
Mic → AudioWorklet (512 samples @16kHz, 32ms) → WS Binary → Go relay → Gemini Live API → WS Binary ← AudioContext (24kHz, adaptive cursor) ← Speaker

## Key conventions
- Domain packages never import storage/LLM libraries directly
- Every code change updates documentation in the same commit
- Verify SDK signatures against live source code, not docs
- YAGNI — build sub-project N before sub-project N+1

## Personas
The documentation supports four persona roles: New Developer (tutorials), Feature Engineer (how-to guides), Architect (reference docs), and Decision Maker (explanations).
